[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000001000 1
4 110111111 8
5 010111010 5
6 101000010 3
7 000111010 4

01 10 000001000 1 match 3
12 21 010111010 5 match 5
23 32 000000010 1
34 43 000000010 1
45 54 000011010 3
56 65 000010001 2
67 76 000000000 a match 0 1 2
70 07 000000000 a match 0 1 2

13 31 100000010 2
24 42 000111010 4 match 7
35 53 101000010 3 match 6
46 64 000010000 1
57 75 101000010 3 match 6
60 06 000000000 a match 0 1 2
71 17 100100110 4

03 30 000000000 a match 0 1 2
14 41 000111010 4 match 7
25 52 000011010 3
36 63 000000000 a match 0 1 2
47 74 000100010 2
50 05 000001000 1 match 3
61 16 010010001 3
72 27 000100010 2

15 51 100011011 5
26 62 010010000 2
37 73 101000010 3 match 6
